a.xlink:title: Abstract base for all element-specific parameter structs.
Parameters for an asymmetric (shifted) Gaussian convolution kernel.
Parameters for a spatially homogeneous boost stimulus.
Parameters for a learned full-matrix field coupling.
Parameters for a sparse Gaussian field coupling (fixed projection).
Parameters for a Gaussian lateral interaction kernel.
Parameters for a Gaussian-shaped external stimulus.
Parameters governing MemoryTrace build-up and decay dynamics.
Parameters for a Mexican-hat lateral interaction kernel.
Parameters that govern a NeuralField's dynamics.
Parameters for an additive normal-noise input.
Parameters for an oscillatory (damped-cosine) convolution kernel.
